summary: 20+ independent forensic agents attacked the strategy from every angle a leak or overfit could enter. No leak found. Cold-reproduces bit-identically. White-noise null mean -0.55 (observed +15.9 sigma above). Universe robust (drop-3 worst case +3.28). Features load-bearing. Data source independent (FRED reproduces 87%). Same-day macro causally clean.

honest_forward_expectation.reason: Pre-2018 secondary OOS Sharpe is +1.26 (regime-flatter). 2018-2026 favored vol-targeted FX mean reversion (COVID, 2022 cycle, JPY interventions). Deployable expectation should anchor on the slower regime.

ftmo_deployment.recommendation: Scale notional ~5x current Ballsack; deploy with CPPI overlay; monitor live Sharpe in month 1-3.

what_is_not_broken: Future-data peek in any feature module
Train-time PCA / scaler / state-grid fitted on test data
Test labels reaching the trained weights at scale (label boundary leak is 1 row/refit, +0.02 Sharpe)
Position-permutation or sign-randomization passing as skill
White-noise / GBM prices producing the observed Sharpe
Edge dependent on the Jan-1 refit boundary (Jul-1 gives +4.46)
Edge dependent on the precise 2018-01-02 OOS start
honest_caveats: Trial-budget overfit (mild): N=200 finds val-better HPs that hurt OOS by 0.13
Macro is essential (Sharpe collapses to 0 without it; same-day macro is causal but mandatory)
USDCHF edge is partially regime-local (post-SNB managed era)
EURGBP is dead weight (+0.10 Sharpe, drop would lift portfolio by +0.15)
Top 5% of days = 50% of net P&L (normal but worth monitoring)
Inverse-vol portfolio layer is functionally inert (1 rebalance in 8 years; equal-weight gives same result)

audit_meta.ic_test_failure_explanation: Strategy is not a 1-day directional forecaster; edge is in multi-day persistence, sizing, and selective flat-days. Other 16 tests still pass.
